title: basella oleracea var. cordifolia
intro: Basella oleracea var. cordifolia, also known as Indian spinach or Malabar spinach, is a type of leafy green vegetable that belongs to the Basellaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of consuming Basella oleracea var. cordifolia include reducing blood pressure, improving digestion, and supporting eye health, among others. In terms of herbal preparations, the leaves can be used fresh or dried, and are often made into teas, tinctures, or infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
